title: 'Minab’s lost lives will haunt me forever': Majid Majidi
summary_full: Renowned filmmaker Majid Majidi, engaged in relief work, shared the devastating impact of ongoing conflict on Iranian cities, highlighting civilian suffering and the loss of innocent lives. He emphasized Iranian resilience and the global public's support, urging international action beyond mere statements to address the humanitarian crisis and prevent regional instability. Aid, particularly medicine, remains critically needed.
